properties.name: mqtt.broker.url
properties.description: URL de ligação ao broker MQTT (ex: tcp://localhost:1883).

properties.name: mqtt.client.id
properties.description: ID único do cliente Spring Boot no broker Mosquitto.

properties.name: mqtt.topics.telemetry
properties.description: Tópico raiz para escutar a telemetria (ex: tub/telemetry/#).
